summary.intent: Implement Matrix OIDC authentication (MSC3861/OAuth2) for Moltis so users on modern homeservers like matrix.org can connect without password auth.
summary.outcome: Full OIDC two-phase browser flow implemented and working end-to-end: MAS registration, browser redirect, token exchange, session persistence, token refresh, and UI integration across channels page and onboarding wizard.

repo: ChannelPlugin trait methods must be overridden in `impl ChannelPlugin for MatrixPlugin`, not as inherent methods on `impl MatrixPlugin` — gateway dispatches through `dyn ChannelPlugin` so inherent methods are invisible
Channel status uses `ch.status === 'connected'` not `ch.connected` — the field name is `status` with string value
matrix_auth().logged_in() returns false for OIDC sessions; client.user_id().is_some() works for both auth types
MAS (Matrix Authentication Service) rejects https://localhost redirect URIs — RFC 8252 loopback requires http://localhost; normalize before registration
MAS also rejects localhost as client_uri — must use real project URL (https://moltis.org) even for local instances
The existing OAuth callback route is /auth/callback, not /api/oauth/callback
matrix_sdk::store::RoomLoadSettings is re-exported from matrix-sdk's store module, no need for direct matrix-sdk-base dependency
Ownership mode checkbox was incorrectly hidden for OIDC; OIDC supports moltis_owned mode and should show the checkbox
Tailwind light-on-light color combinations used throughout: emerald-100 on emerald-500/10 and sky-100 on sky-500/10 — unreadable, need dark text on light bg

code.finding: Status probe used matrix_auth().logged_in() which always returns false for OIDC; changed to client.user_id().is_some()
New OIDC module: normalize_redirect_uri() converts https://localhost to http://localhost for MAS compliance; client_uri must be real HTTPS project URL not localhost
oidc_start/oidc_complete added as trait methods with default noop impl so gateway can dispatch through dyn ChannelPlugin
Ownership card auth mode check used `!== 'password'` catch-all, meaning OIDC fell through to access_token messaging; needs explicit oidc branch
matrixOwnershipModeGuidance checked authMode !== 'password' to show user-managed message; OIDC should be treated like password (moltis_owned capable)

workflow: Iterative MAS registration debugging requires rebuilding and retrying against live MAS — unit tests cannot catch HTTP 400 responses from OIDC server policy
Greptile automated 4 review iterations catching: token exposure via Debug derive, blocking std::fs in async, URL parameter injection, polling interval leak, and dead oidc_issuer config field
Preact/HTM VDOM reuses DOM nodes aggressively when switching between phases — adding key= attribute to submit button prevents ghost text from previous button labels bleeding through
CSS transition: opacity 0.15s on provider-btn combined with Preact node reuse causes visible ghost text during state transitions

friction: Three separate MAS registration failures required live server iteration: (1) https vs http redirect URI, (2) localhost as client_uri, (3) wrong callback path /api/oauth/callback vs /auth/callback — none catchable by unit tests
oidc_start/oidc_complete implemented as inherent MatrixPlugin methods first, silently routing to noop default — error message 'OIDC login not supported' was misleading
Rate limit interruptions mid-implementation required two 'proceed' prompts to continue
Nested ternary in HTM template `${a ? b : c ? d : e}` caused Preact ghost text rendering — not caught until user reported visual bug
Clippy false positive on #[cfg(unix)] OpenOptionsExt trait import — reorganized code structure to satisfy it
oidc_issuer config field added but matrix-sdk 0.16 has no API to pass custom issuer — field was dead code, removed after Greptile flagged it
open_items: E2E Playwright tests (channels-matrix.spec.js) test UI structure but cannot test actual MAS OIDC flow — no test MAS instance available
Duplicate Matrix account guard checks by user_id after login but cannot prevent duplicate OIDC start flows for the same homeserver before user_id is known
OIDC re-authentication flow for EditMatrixModal ('Re-authenticate' button) is mentioned in the plan but not fully implemented

Cross-signing bootstrap for moltis_owned OIDC channels uses bootstrap_cross_signing_if_needed(None) — OAuth reset flow (CrossSigningResetAuthType::OAuth) exists in client.rs:428 but not tested end-to-end
oidc_issuer override removed because matrix-sdk 0.16 has no API for custom issuer — revisit when matrix-sdk exposes issuer override capability
Onboarding MatrixForm ghost button fix (Preact key= attribute) is a workaround — root cause is VDOM node reuse across phase transitions, may affect other channel type forms
